# IH Project Data Management Interface

This is an HTML-based interface for managing records from the wmt-assetprotection-prod.Store_Support.IH_Project_Data data source.

## Project Structure
- `index.html` - Main interface with forms for creating and updating records
- `styles.css` - Responsive CSS styling
- `script.js` - JavaScript for form handling and data operations
- `README.md` - Documentation and usage instructions

## Development Notes
- Pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript implementation
- Responsive design for mobile and desktop
- Local storage simulation for demo purposes
- Modular form structure for easy field customization
